data.content: Refined the dispatch-level Swap Agent presentation so the only swap control now sits in a dedicated dispatch-wide tools area at the bottom of Settings > Dispatch, with copy that explicitly frames it as a single global replacement rather than a per-step edit. Integrated on main and pushed as 4d3344dcd20b. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile in the dedicated worktree, bun run lint (warnings only, pre-existing), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
